productDisplayName: Puma Men Future Cat White Shoes
description: Designed for everyday wear, the puma range of everyday sneakers embodies excitement and energy for life. The Future cat comes with synthetic overlays on the sides with a textured backfoot finish. The outsoles with horizontal grips make these shoes very comfortable and durable while providing excellent grip, making it perfect for urban wear.UpperFeatures a low-profile design for durabilityPremium leather upper for longer wear Bold, contrasting formstripe outlining at the lateral side of the midfootLightly padded tongue and collar for extra comfort Asymmetrical lacing system gives a snug Fit Textile lining with cushioned footbed for enhanced comfort Removable footbed to accommodate an orthoticEmbroidered jumping cat logo on the medial side of the midfoot and cat logo embossed on the lateral toeUpper adhered to the outsole for durabilityOutsoleTPR outsole for enhanced traction Embedded puma Future Cat embedded on the rubber outsoleOutsole reinforced onto the upper as a heel guard with a branded lug at the heel collar for styleshoe careRub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dustDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
